title: Compress It!
description: Craft Slabs back into blocks, tie and compress various things! Free some slots in your inventory!
body:
### Tired of endless garbage in your inventory? ![Without Compress It! mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K44jnDZh/images/47e41a300e0f22c4677b47d1daae5c63653ae01d.png) ### Compress it! Free some slots with nice looking textures! ![With Compress It! mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K44jnDZh/images/e8ff087ddc44a6e3d8bf48afcd55fe2f4cdfd3db.png)
### Get rid of remaining doors, slabs, trapdoors, pressure plates, buttons, carpets, glass bottles, etc. Craft them back into blocks. Compress redundant loot. [The mod is completed! If you want something new, join our discord and suggest your idea] ## Compatibility Compatible with both Fabric and Quilt Mod Loaders
Fabric MC: 1.19.x - 1.20.X --> v2 - v3 versions Fabric MC: 1.18.x - v1 versions [Not supported]
Forge MC: 1.19.x - 1.20.x --> v2+ versions [Not supported]
[For fabric] Make sure you've installed Fabric Api
## Craft incompatibility / overlapping If you've encountered a craft incompatibility with other mods, use [Polymorph](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymorph/) mod ## Available content | v2.5.0

New Blocks Mojang forgot to add these blocks, so we added them by ourselves
Block of Charcoal
Charcoal Slab
Coal Slab
New Crafts REI or similar mods are recommended to see all the new crafts!
8 Colored Wool + white dye / bone meal ---> 8 White Wool
8 Glass Panes ---> 3 Glass Blocks
